svg.text: plugin: claudster@claudster · marketplace: saajunaid/junai · core: 11 skills · extras: 89 skills · agents: 12 · POSTER 2 OF 2
Use first when starting a new feature. Ask questions, surface unknowns, produce written spec.
Generates .github/plans/*.md. Phases map to /tdd cycles. Tracks progress across sessions.
Red → Green → Refactor per behavior unit
Core loop. Agents auto-fire during this phase. Repeat per plan phase. Do not skip red.
Design-first: lock UI tokens before coding
Optional. Run before any UI /tdd cycle. Proposes font, colour, animation — prevents drift.
Auto-detects Gitea / GitHub Actions / local. CI-aware. Runs after /tdd phase is green.
Manual. Run before every session close. Hook reads relay.md automatically at SessionStart.
Write or refresh relay.md at repo root
Creates/updates relay.md with full context. Alias for: run /handoff equivalent mid-session.
Wire hooks + CLAUDE.md for new repo
One-time per project. Writes .claude/settings.json with 4 hooks. Generates CLAUDE.md.
User-triggered, billed. Or: /code-review ultra <PR#> for GitHub PR. Needs git repo.
read-only · return findings · do NOT edit code
Captures baseline before change, verifies against it, returns Evidence Bundle.
Use for: hotfixes, DB migrations, security-sensitive changes. Evidence-first.
When to invoke: before applying anything where correctness matters more than speed.
Flags staleness, duplication, misrouted how-to content across project.
Use: every few weeks or when any CLAUDE.md exceeds ~80 lines.
Proposes curated version — shows diff to main thread first, never writes silently.
Reviews diff for correctness, security vulnerabilities, and style adherence.
Use: after a phase is green and before commit/merge. Returns prioritised issue list.
Also use: /code-review ultra for full cloud-based multi-agent review.
Reads broadly, returns audit-findings report + open questions.
Use: before architecture, major feature, or refactor in an unfamiliar project.
Source-to-target mapping, transforms, ingestion, validation design.
Use: adding pipeline, integrating source, auditing data layer.
Reproduces and isolates bug, returns root cause + fix + regression test.
Use: when a test fails or behavior is wrong and cause is unknown.
Extracts non-obvious learnings, writes to instructions / runbooks / CLAUDE.md.
Use: after completed implementation before context is lost. Writes docs only.
Checks file paths, symbol names, API shapes, dependencies. PASS/FAIL report.
Use: after plan is drafted, before any code is written. Read-only.
Severity-ranked findings. Auth/crypto/PII code, pre-merge security review.
Returns findings only — main thread applies fixes.
Reviews schema, queries, stored procs, indexing. Returns suggested SQL + rationale.
Use: slow queries, new schema, or before shipping hand-written SQL.
Write + run tests, compact pass/fail report
Writes tests, runs suite, returns counts + failures. Enforces TDD discipline.
Use: after implementing a phase or to add coverage. Can Edit/Write test files.
Screenshots at desktop + mobile. Returns structured UX/accessibility findings.
Use: after frontend phase complete, before shipping. Provide URL + optional design doc.
Write session state to relay.md — run before every close
Create or refresh relay.md at repo root (mid-session or on demand)
Discover requirements via dialogue, produce written PRD
Red-Green-Refactor cycle with strict TDD discipline
Lock UI design tokens before any frontend code (optional)
Wire hooks + CLAUDE.md for a new project (run once per repo)
View agent-log.jsonl — dispatch history written by SubagentStop hook
Persist a fact or decision across sessions via auto-memory system
CLAUDSTER-EXTRAS PLUGIN · 89 skills · disabled by default · saves ~8,745 always-on tokens when off
Create Excel, Word, PowerPoint, PDF files.
Full CRUD + JWT auth + test suite scaffolding.
Schema design, Alembic migrations, query review.
Components, forms, tables, TanStack Query hooks.
CI pipelines, containers, web server config.
NSSM service wiring, IIS, PowerShell automation.
Auth patterns, API clients, access control.
Trace, profile, leak, and concurrency analysis.
Agents are read-only specialists. They spawn in isolated contexts, return structured reports,
and never write code directly. The main Claude thread applies their output.
Skills are prompt templates invoked by /skill-name. Extras add 89 more at the cost of token overhead.
Toggle extras only when you need them — disable after to restore lean footprint.
Skills NOT synced to junai GitHub: validate_agents.py, vmie/* — run from agent-sandbox only.
1. Always run /handoff before closing a session. relay.md is what saves you.
2. Run /setup-project-ai once per new repo to wire all 4 hooks automatically.
3. Use preflight agent after writing a plan and before writing any code.
4. Extras off by default — enable only for sessions where you need those skills.
5. Marketplace source: github:saajunaid/junai. Plugin name: claudster.
plugin: claudster@claudster · extras: claudster-extras@claudster · See POSTER 1 for workflow lifecycle
